title: Method Names Should Follow a Defined Naming Convention
description: Shared naming conventions are crucial for efficient team collaboration. This rule flags any method name that does not match the provided regular expression. The default regular expression is ^[a-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$. For example, a method named 'DoSomething' would be flagged since it does not comply with the convention. Overriding methods are excluded from this rule.
recommendation: Rename the method to match the defined naming convention. For example, 'DoSomething' should be renamed to 'doSomething'.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by ensuring a consistent method naming convention across the codebase.

checks.message: Method names should follow camelCase convention
